name: Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each egg lengthwise into halves and carefully remove the yolks.
2. Place the yolks in a bowl and mash them with a fork.
3. Add prepared mustard, mayo or salad dressing, and pepper to the mashed yolks. Mix well.
4. Spoon the yolk mixture back into the egg whites, filling each half heaping with the mixture.
